originalContent

updatedContent

updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ToggleButton?> <?import javafx.scene.effect.DropShadow?> <?import javafx.scene.effect.Glow?> <?import javafx.scene.image.Image?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.ColumnConstraints?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.RowConstraints?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.paint.Color?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<StackPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.example.battleship.controller.GameController"> <children> <ImageView fitHeight="721.0" fitWidth="1281.0" pickOnBounds="true"> <image> <Image url="@images/sea-ships-art-battle-wallpaper-preview.jpg" /> </image> </ImageView> <VBox alignment="TOP_CENTER" prefHeight="720.0" prefWidth="1280.0" spacing="12.0"> <padding> <Insets bottom="15.0" left="25.0" right="25.0" top="15.0" /> </padding> <children> <!-- Top Status Bar --> <HBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="20.0" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.8); -fx-border-color: #334155; -fx-border-radius: 10; -fx-background-radius: 10;"> <padding> <Insets bottom="8.0" left="20.0" right="20.0" top="8.0" /> </padding> <children> <VBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <children> <Label fx:id="lblPlayerName" text="Comandante: Jugador" textFill="#38bdf8"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label fx:id="lblPlayerShipsLeft" text="Flota Aliada: 10/10" textFill="#4ade80"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="13.0" /> </font> </Label> </children> </VBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="10.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label fx:id="lblTurnStatus" alignment="CENTER" style="-fx-background-color: #0284c7; -fx-background-radius: 20;" text=" TURNO DEL JUGADOR" textFill="WHITE"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="6.0" left="25.0" right="25.0" top="6.0" /> </padding> <effect> <Glow level="0.3" /> </effect> </Label> </children> </HBox>
<VBox alignment="CENTER_RIGHT"> <children> <Label text="Oponente: Máquina IA" textFill="#f87171"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label fx:id="lblEnemyShipsLeft" text="Flota Enemiga: 10/10" textFill="#fca5a5"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="13.0" /> </font> </Label> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Debug feature button (HU-3 for teacher inspection) --> <ToggleButton fx:id="btnToggleEnemyBoard" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleToggleEnemyBoard" style="-fx-background-color: #7c3aed; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-cursor: hand;" text=" Modo Inspección (Profesor)"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="12.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="8.0" left="12.0" right="12.0" top="8.0" /> </padding> </ToggleButton>
<Button fx:id="btnSaveAndExit" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleSaveAndExit" style="-fx-background-color: #dc2626; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-cursor: hand;" text=" Guardar y Salir"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="12.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="8.0" left="12.0" right="12.0" top="8.0" /> </padding> </Button> </children> </HBox>
<!-- Twin Boards Container --> <HBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="35.0" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <!-- Player Board (Posicion) --> <VBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="8.0"> <children> <Label style="-fx-background-color: #1e293b; -fx-border-color: #38bdf8; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-background-radius: 5;" text=" TABLERO DE POSICIÓN (TU FLOTA)" textFill="#38bdf8"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="15.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="4.0" left="12.0" right="12.0" top="4.0" /> </padding> </Label> <GridPane fx:id="gridPlayerBoard" gridLinesVisible="true" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.95); -fx-border-color: #0284c7; -fx-border-width: 2;"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> </columnConstraints> <rowConstraints> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> </rowConstraints> </GridPane> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Enemy Board (Principal) --> <VBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="8.0"> <children> <Label style="-fx-background-color: #1e293b; -fx-border-color: #ef4444; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-background-radius: 5;" text="⚔ TABLERO PRINCIPAL (DISPAROS A ENEMIGO)" textFill="#f87171"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="15.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="4.0" left="12.0" right="12.0" top="4.0" /> </padding> </Label> <GridPane fx:id="gridEnemyBoard" gridLinesVisible="true" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.95); -fx-border-color: #dc2626; -fx-border-width: 2;"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> </columnConstraints> <rowConstraints> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> </rowConstraints> <effect> <DropShadow radius="10.0"> <color> <Color red="0.8" green="0.1" blue="0.1" opacity="0.3" /> </color> </DropShadow> </effect> </GridPane> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox> </children> </StackPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ToggleButton?> <?import javafx.scene.effect.DropShadow?> <?import javafx.scene.effect.Glow?> <?import javafx.scene.image.Image?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.ColumnConstraints?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.RowConstraints?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.paint.Color?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<StackPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/17" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.example.battleship.controller.GameController"> <children> <ImageView fitHeight="721.0" fitWidth="1281.0" pickOnBounds="true"> <image> <Image url="@images/sea-ships-art-battle-wallpaper-preview.jpg" /> </image> </ImageView> <VBox alignment="TOP_CENTER" prefHeight="720.0" prefWidth="1280.0" spacing="12.0"> <padding> <Insets bottom="15.0" left="25.0" right="25.0" top="15.0" /> </padding> <children> <!-- Top Status Bar --> <HBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="20.0" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.8); -fx-border-color: #334155; -fx-border-radius: 10; -fx-background-radius: 10;"> <padding> <Insets bottom="8.0" left="20.0" right="20.0" top="8.0" /> </padding> <children> <VBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <children> <Label fx:id="lblPlayerName" text="Comandante: Jugador" textFill="#38bdf8"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label fx:id="lblPlayerShipsLeft" text="Flota Aliada: 10/10" textFill="#4ade80"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="13.0" /> </font> </Label> </children> </VBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="10.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label fx:id="lblTurnStatus" alignment="CENTER" style="-fx-background-color: #0284c7; -fx-background-radius: 20;" text=" TURNO DEL JUGADOR" textFill="WHITE"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="6.0" left="25.0" right="25.0" top="6.0" /> </padding> <effect> <Glow level="0.3" /> </effect> </Label> </children> </HBox>
<VBox alignment="CENTER_RIGHT"> <children> <Label text="Oponente: Máquina IA" textFill="#f87171"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label fx:id="lblEnemyShipsLeft" text="Flota Enemiga: 10/10" textFill="#fca5a5"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="13.0" /> </font> </Label> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Debug feature button (HU-3 for teacher inspection) --> <ToggleButton fx:id="btnToggleEnemyBoard" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleToggleEnemyBoard" style="-fx-background-color: #7c3aed; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-cursor: hand;" text=" Modo Inspección (Profesor)"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="12.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="8.0" left="12.0" right="12.0" top="8.0" /> </padding> </ToggleButton>
<Button fx:id="btnSaveAndExit" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleSaveAndExit" style="-fx-background-color: #dc2626; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-cursor: hand;" text=" Guardar y Salir"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="12.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="8.0" left="12.0" right="12.0" top="8.0" /> </padding> </Button> </children> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="actionStatusLabel" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.85); -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-border-color: #475569; -fx-border-radius: 10;" text="Selecciona una coordenada en el radar enemigo." textFill="#e2e8f0"> <padding> <Insets bottom="8.0" left="14.0" right="14.0" top="8.0" /> </padding> </Label>
<!-- Twin Boards Container --> <HBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="35.0" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <!-- Player Board (Posicion) --> <VBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="8.0"> <children> <Label style="-fx-background-color: #1e293b; -fx-border-color: #38bdf8; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-background-radius: 5;" text=" TABLERO DE POSICIÓN (TU FLOTA)" textFill="#38bdf8"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="15.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="4.0" left="12.0" right="12.0" top="4.0" /> </padding> </Label> <GridPane fx:id="gridPlayerBoard" gridLinesVisible="true" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.95); -fx-border-color: #0284c7; -fx-border-width: 2;"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> </columnConstraints> <rowConstraints> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> </rowConstraints> </GridPane> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Enemy Board (Principal) --> <VBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="8.0"> <children> <Label style="-fx-background-color: #1e293b; -fx-border-color: #ef4444; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-background-radius: 5;" text="⚔ TABLERO PRINCIPAL (DISPAROS A ENEMIGO)" textFill="#f87171"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="15.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="4.0" left="12.0" right="12.0" top="4.0" /> </padding> </Label> <GridPane fx:id="gridEnemyBoard" gridLinesVisible="true" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.95); -fx-border-color: #dc2626; -fx-border-width: 2;"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> </columnConstraints> <rowConstraints> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> </rowConstraints> <effect> <DropShadow radius="10.0"> <color> <Color red="0.8" green="0.1" blue="0.1" opacity="0.3" /> </color> </DropShadow> </effect> </GridPane> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox> </children> </StackPane>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.effect.DropShadow?> <?import javafx.scene.effect.Glow?> <?import javafx.scene.image.Image?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.paint.Color?> <?import javafx.scene.shape.Line?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<StackPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.example.battleship.controller.EndController"> <children> <ImageView fitHeight="720.0" fitWidth="1281.0" pickOnBounds="true"> <image> <Image url="@images/63186.jpg" /> </image> </ImageView> <VBox alignment="CENTER" prefHeight="720.0" prefWidth="1280.0" spacing="20.0"> <padding> <Insets bottom="30.0" left="40.0" right="40.0" top="30.0" /> </padding> <children> <VBox alignment="CENTER" maxWidth="580.0" spacing="20.0" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.92); -fx-border-color: #475569; -fx-border-width: 2; -fx-border-radius: 16; -fx-background-radius: 16;"> <padding> <Insets bottom="35.0" left="40.0" right="40.0" top="35.0" /> </padding> <children> <!-- Result Header --> <Label fx:id="lblTitle" text=" DERROTA " textFill="#ef4444"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="48.0" /> </font> <effect> <Glow level="0.7" /> </effect> </Label>
<Line endX="400.0" stroke="#475569" strokeWidth="2.0" />
<Label text=" ESTADÍSTICAS FINAL DE LA PARTIDA" textFill="#f8fafc"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="20.0" /> </font> </Label>
<!-- Player Stats --> <VBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.7); -fx-border-radius: 10; -fx-background-radius: 10;"> <padding> <Insets bottom="15.0" left="20.0" right="20.0" top="15.0" /> </padding> <children> <Label fx:id="lblPlayerNickname" text=" JUGADOR: Andres" textFill="#4ade80"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> </Label> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <children> <Label text="⚓ Barcos enemigos hundidos:" textFill="#cbd5e1"> <font> <Font size="15.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label fx:id="lblEnemyShipsSunk" text="1 / 10" textFill="#38bdf8"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="15.0" /> </font> </Label> </children> </HBox> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <children> <Label text=" Disparos fallidos (Agua):" textFill="#cbd5e1"> <font> <Font size="15.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label fx:id="lblPlayerMissedShots" text="42" textFill="#f8fafc"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="15.0" /> </font> </Label> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Machine Stats --> <VBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.7); -fx-border-radius: 10; -fx-background-radius: 10;"> <padding> <Insets bottom="15.0" left="20.0" right="20.0" top="15.0" /> </padding> <children> <Label text=" MÁQUINA IA" textFill="#f87171"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> </Label> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <children> <Label text="⚓ Tus barcos hundidos:" textFill="#cbd5e1"> <font> <Font size="15.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label fx:id="lblPlayerShipsSunk" text="10 / 10" textFill="#f87171"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="15.0" /> </font> </Label> </children> </HBox> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <children> <Label text=" Fallos de la máquina:" textFill="#cbd5e1"> <font> <Font size="15.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label fx:id="lblEnemyMissedShots" text="41" textFill="#f8fafc"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="15.0" /> </font> </Label> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Return Button --> <Button fx:id="btnMainMenu" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onRestartButtonClick" style="-fx-background-color: linear-gradient(to right, #0284c7, #0369a1); -fx-text-fill: #ffffff; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="⬅ VOLVER AL MENÚ PRINCIPAL"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="12.0" left="25.0" right="25.0" top="12.0" /> </padding> <effect> <DropShadow radius="8.0"> <color> <Color red="0.0" green="0.4" blue="0.7" opacity="0.4" /> </color> </DropShadow> </effect> </Button> </children> <effect> <DropShadow blurType="GAUSSIAN" height="35.0" radius="17.0" width="35.0"> <color> <Color red="0.0" green="0.0" blue="0.0" opacity="0.6" /> </color> </DropShadow> </effect> </VBox> </children> </VBox> </children> </StackPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.effect.DropShadow?> <?import javafx.scene.effect.Glow?> <?import javafx.scene.image.Image?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.paint.Color?> <?import javafx.scene.shape.Line?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<StackPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/17" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.example.battleship.controller.EndController"> <children> <ImageView fitHeight="720.0" fitWidth="1281.0" pickOnBounds="true"> <image> <Image url="@images/63186.jpg" /> </image> </ImageView> <VBox alignment="CENTER" prefHeight="720.0" prefWidth="1280.0" spacing="20.0"> <padding> <Insets bottom="30.0" left="40.0" right="40.0" top="30.0" /> </padding> <children> <VBox alignment="CENTER" maxWidth="580.0" spacing="20.0" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.92); -fx-border-color: #475569; -fx-border-width: 2; -fx-border-radius: 16; -fx-background-radius: 16;"> <padding> <Insets bottom="35.0" left="40.0" right="40.0" top="35.0" /> </padding> <children> <!-- Result Header --> <Label fx:id="lblTitle" text=" DERROTA " textFill="#ef4444"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="48.0" /> </font> <effect> <Glow level="0.7" /> </effect> </Label>
<Line endX="400.0" stroke="#475569" strokeWidth="2.0" />
<Label text=" ESTADÍSTICAS FINAL DE LA PARTIDA" textFill="#f8fafc"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="20.0" /> </font> </Label>
<!-- Player Stats --> <VBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.7); -fx-border-radius: 10; -fx-background-radius: 10;"> <padding> <Insets bottom="15.0" left="20.0" right="20.0" top="15.0" /> </padding> <children> <Label fx:id="lblPlayerNickname" text=" JUGADOR: Andres" textFill="#4ade80"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> </Label> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <children> <Label text="⚓ Barcos enemigos hundidos:" textFill="#cbd5e1"> <font> <Font size="15.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label fx:id="lblEnemyShipsSunk" text="1 / 10" textFill="#38bdf8"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="15.0" /> </font> </Label> </children> </HBox> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <children> <Label text=" Disparos fallidos (Agua):" textFill="#cbd5e1"> <font> <Font size="15.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label fx:id="lblPlayerMissedShots" text="42" textFill="#f8fafc"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="15.0" /> </font> </Label> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Machine Stats --> <VBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.7); -fx-border-radius: 10; -fx-background-radius: 10;"> <padding> <Insets bottom="15.0" left="20.0" right="20.0" top="15.0" /> </padding> <children> <Label text=" MÁQUINA IA" textFill="#f87171"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> </Label> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <children> <Label text="⚓ Tus barcos hundidos:" textFill="#cbd5e1"> <font> <Font size="15.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label fx:id="lblPlayerShipsSunk" text="10 / 10" textFill="#f87171"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="15.0" /> </font> </Label> </children> </HBox> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <children> <Label text=" Fallos de la máquina:" textFill="#cbd5e1"> <font> <Font size="15.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label fx:id="lblEnemyMissedShots" text="41" textFill="#f8fafc"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="15.0" /> </font> </Label> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Return Button --> <Button fx:id="btnMainMenu" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onRestartButtonClick" style="-fx-background-color: linear-gradient(to right, #0284c7, #0369a1); -fx-text-fill: #ffffff; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="⬅ VOLVER AL MENÚ PRINCIPAL"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="12.0" left="25.0" right="25.0" top="12.0" /> </padding> <effect> <DropShadow radius="8.0"> <color> <Color red="0.0" green="0.4" blue="0.7" opacity="0.4" /> </color> </DropShadow> </effect> </Button> </children> <effect> <DropShadow blurType="GAUSSIAN" height="35.0" radius="17.0" width="35.0"> <color> <Color red="0.0" green="0.0" blue="0.0" opacity="0.6" /> </color> </DropShadow> </effect> </VBox> </children> </VBox> </children> </StackPane>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.effect.DropShadow?> <?import javafx.scene.effect.Glow?> <?import javafx.scene.image.Image?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.paint.Color?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<StackPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.battleship.controller.MainMenuController"> <children> <ImageView fitHeight="720.0" fitWidth="1280.0" pickOnBounds="true"> <image> <Image url="@images/HD-wallpaper-naval-battle-sea-ships-warfare.jpg" /> </image> </ImageView> <VBox alignment="CENTER" prefHeight="720.0" prefWidth="1280.0" spacing="25.0"> <padding> <Insets bottom="40.0" left="40.0" right="40.0" top="40.0" /> </padding> <children> <!-- Top Exit Bar --> <HBox alignment="TOP_LEFT" prefWidth="1200.0"> <children> <Button fx:id="btnExit" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleExit" style="-fx-background-color: #334155; -fx-text-fill: #f8fafc; -fx-border-color: #64748b; -fx-border-radius: 8; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-cursor: hand;" text=" SALIR" textFill="WHITE"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="14.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="8.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="8.0" /> </padding> </Button> </children> </HBox>
<VBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="15.0" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <!-- Title Header --> <VBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="5.0" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.75); -fx-border-color: #38bdf8; -fx-border-width: 2; -fx-border-radius: 12; -fx-background-radius: 12;"> <padding> <Insets bottom="20.0" left="50.0" right="50.0" top="20.0" /> </padding> <children> <Label text="⚓ BATALLA NAVAL ⚓" textFill="#38bdf8"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="52.0" /> </font> <effect> <Glow level="0.6" /> </effect> </Label> <Label text="ESTRATEGIA & TÁCTICA MILITAR" textFill="#94a3b8"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> </Label> </children> <effect> <DropShadow blurType="GAUSSIAN" height="30.0" radius="14.5" width="30.0"> <color> <Color red="0.22" green="0.74" blue="0.97" opacity="0.3" /> </color> </DropShadow> </effect> </VBox>
<VBox alignment="CENTER" maxWidth="450.0" spacing="18.0" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.85); -fx-border-color: #475569; -fx-border-radius: 12; -fx-background-radius: 12;"> <padding> <Insets bottom="30.0" left="35.0" right="35.0" top="30.0" /> </padding> <children> <Label text="IDENTIFICACIÓN DEL COMANDANTE" textFill="#f8fafc"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="15.0" /> </font> </Label>
<TextField fx:id="txtNickname" alignment="CENTER" promptText="Ingresa tu Nickname / Apodo" style="-fx-background-color: #0f172a; -fx-text-fill: #38bdf8; -fx-prompt-text-fill: #64748b; -fx-border-color: #38bdf8; -fx-border-radius: 8; -fx-background-radius: 8;"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="10.0" left="15.0" right="15.0" top="10.0" /> </padding> </TextField>
<Button fx:id="btnNewGame" maxWidth="Infinity" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleNewGame" style="-fx-background-color: linear-gradient(to right, #0284c7, #0369a1); -fx-text-fill: #ffffff; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="⚔ NUEVA PARTIDA"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="18.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="12.0" top="12.0" /> </padding> <effect> <DropShadow radius="8.0"> <color> <Color red="0.0" green="0.5" blue="0.8" opacity="0.4" /> </color> </DropShadow> </effect> </Button>
<Button fx:id="btnContinue" maxWidth="Infinity" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleContinue" style="-fx-background-color: linear-gradient(to right, #15803d, #166534); -fx-text-fill: #ffffff; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="▶ CONTINUAR PARTIDA"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="18.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="12.0" top="12.0" /> </padding> <effect> <DropShadow radius="8.0"> <color> <Color red="0.1" green="0.6" blue="0.2" opacity="0.4" /> </color> </DropShadow> </effect> </Button> </children> </VBox> </children> </VBox> </children> </VBox> </children> </StackPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.effect.DropShadow?> <?import javafx.scene.effect.Glow?> <?import javafx.scene.image.Image?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.paint.Color?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<StackPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/17" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.example.battleship.controller.MenuController"> <children> <ImageView fitHeight="720.0" fitWidth="1280.0" pickOnBounds="true"> <image> <Image url="@images/HD-wallpaper-naval-battle-sea-ships-warfare.jpg" /> </image> </ImageView> <VBox alignment="CENTER" prefHeight="720.0" prefWidth="1280.0" spacing="25.0"> <padding> <Insets bottom="40.0" left="40.0" right="40.0" top="40.0" /> </padding> <children> <!-- Top Exit Bar --> <HBox alignment="TOP_LEFT" prefWidth="1200.0"> <children> <Button fx:id="btnExit" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleExit" style="-fx-background-color: #334155; -fx-text-fill: #f8fafc; -fx-border-color: #64748b; -fx-border-radius: 8; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-cursor: hand;" text=" SALIR" textFill="WHITE"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="14.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="8.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="8.0" /> </padding> </Button> </children> </HBox>
<VBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="15.0" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <!-- Title Header --> <VBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="5.0" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.75); -fx-border-color: #38bdf8; -fx-border-width: 2; -fx-border-radius: 12; -fx-background-radius: 12;"> <padding> <Insets bottom="20.0" left="50.0" right="50.0" top="20.0" /> </padding> <children> <Label text="⚓ BATALLA NAVAL ⚓" textFill="#38bdf8"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="52.0" /> </font> <effect> <Glow level="0.6" /> </effect> </Label> <Label text="ESTRATEGIA & TÁCTICA MILITAR" textFill="#94a3b8"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> </Label> </children> <effect> <DropShadow blurType="GAUSSIAN" height="30.0" radius="14.5" width="30.0"> <color> <Color red="0.22" green="0.74" blue="0.97" opacity="0.3" /> </color> </DropShadow> </effect> </VBox>
<VBox alignment="CENTER" maxWidth="450.0" spacing="18.0" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.85); -fx-border-color: #475569; -fx-border-radius: 12; -fx-background-radius: 12;"> <padding> <Insets bottom="30.0" left="35.0" right="35.0" top="30.0" /> </padding> <children> <Label text="IDENTIFICACIÓN DEL COMANDANTE" textFill="#f8fafc"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="15.0" /> </font> </Label>
<TextField fx:id="txtNickname" alignment="CENTER" promptText="Ingresa tu Nickname / Apodo" style="-fx-background-color: #0f172a; -fx-text-fill: #38bdf8; -fx-prompt-text-fill: #64748b; -fx-border-color: #38bdf8; -fx-border-radius: 8; -fx-background-radius: 8;"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="10.0" left="15.0" right="15.0" top="10.0" /> </padding> </TextField>
<Button fx:id="btnNewGame" maxWidth="Infinity" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleNewGame" style="-fx-background-color: linear-gradient(to right, #0284c7, #0369a1); -fx-text-fill: #ffffff; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="⚔ NUEVA PARTIDA"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="18.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="12.0" top="12.0" /> </padding> <effect> <DropShadow radius="8.0"> <color> <Color red="0.0" green="0.5" blue="0.8" opacity="0.4" /> </color> </DropShadow> </effect> </Button>
<Button fx:id="btnContinue" maxWidth="Infinity" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleContinue" style="-fx-background-color: linear-gradient(to right, #15803d, #166534); -fx-text-fill: #ffffff; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="▶ CONTINUAR PARTIDA"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="18.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="12.0" top="12.0" /> </padding> <effect> <DropShadow radius="8.0"> <color> <Color red="0.1" green="0.6" blue="0.2" opacity="0.4" /> </color> </DropShadow> </effect> </Button> </children> </VBox> </children> </VBox> </children> </VBox> </children> </StackPane>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ToggleButton?> <?import javafx.scene.effect.DropShadow?> <?import javafx.scene.effect.Glow?> <?import javafx.scene.image.Image?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.ColumnConstraints?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.RowConstraints?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.paint.Color?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<StackPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.battleship.controller.GameViewController"> <children> <ImageView fitHeight="722.0" fitWidth="1281.0" pickOnBounds="true"> <image> <Image url="@images/sea-ships-art-battle-wallpaper-preview.jpg" /> </image> </ImageView> <VBox alignment="TOP_CENTER" prefHeight="720.0" prefWidth="1280.0" spacing="12.0"> <padding> <Insets bottom="15.0" left="25.0" right="25.0" top="15.0" /> </padding> <children> <!-- Top Status Bar --> <HBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="20.0" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.8); -fx-border-color: #334155; -fx-border-radius: 10; -fx-background-radius: 10;"> <padding> <Insets bottom="8.0" left="20.0" right="20.0" top="8.0" /> </padding> <children> <VBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <children> <Label fx:id="lblPlayerName" text="Comandante: Jugador" textFill="#38bdf8"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label fx:id="lblPlayerShipsLeft" text="Flota Aliada: 10/10" textFill="#4ade80"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="13.0" /> </font> </Label> </children> </VBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="10.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label fx:id="lblTurnStatus" alignment="CENTER" style="-fx-background-color: #0284c7; -fx-background-radius: 20;" text=" TURNO DEL JUGADOR" textFill="WHITE"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="6.0" left="25.0" right="25.0" top="6.0" /> </padding> <effect> <Glow level="0.3" /> </effect> </Label> </children> </HBox>
<VBox alignment="CENTER_RIGHT"> <children> <Label text="Oponente: Máquina IA" textFill="#f87171"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label fx:id="lblEnemyShipsLeft" text="Flota Enemiga: 10/10" textFill="#fca5a5"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="13.0" /> </font> </Label> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Debug feature button (HU-3 for teacher inspection) --> <ToggleButton fx:id="btnToggleEnemyBoard" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleToggleEnemyBoard" style="-fx-background-color: #7c3aed; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-cursor: hand;" text=" Modo Inspección (Profesor)"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="12.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="8.0" left="12.0" right="12.0" top="8.0" /> </padding> </ToggleButton>
<Button fx:id="btnSaveAndExit" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleSaveAndExit" style="-fx-background-color: #dc2626; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-cursor: hand;" text=" Guardar y Salir"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="12.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="8.0" left="12.0" right="12.0" top="8.0" /> </padding> </Button> </children> </HBox>
<!-- Twin Boards Container --> <HBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="35.0" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <!-- Player Board (Posicion) --> <VBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="8.0"> <children> <Label style="-fx-background-color: #1e293b; -fx-border-color: #38bdf8; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-background-radius: 5;" text=" TABLERO DE POSICIÓN (TU FLOTA)" textFill="#38bdf8"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="15.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="4.0" left="12.0" right="12.0" top="4.0" /> </padding> </Label> <GridPane fx:id="gridPlayerBoard" gridLinesVisible="true" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.95); -fx-border-color: #0284c7; -fx-border-width: 2;"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> </columnConstraints> <rowConstraints> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> </rowConstraints> </GridPane> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Enemy Board (Principal) --> <VBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="8.0"> <children> <Label style="-fx-background-color: #1e293b; -fx-border-color: #ef4444; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-background-radius: 5;" text="⚔ TABLERO PRINCIPAL (DISPAROS A ENEMIGO)" textFill="#f87171"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="15.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="4.0" left="12.0" right="12.0" top="4.0" /> </padding> </Label> <GridPane fx:id="gridEnemyBoard" gridLinesVisible="true" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.95); -fx-border-color: #dc2626; -fx-border-width: 2;"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> </columnConstraints> <rowConstraints> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> </rowConstraints> <effect> <DropShadow radius="10.0"> <color> <Color red="0.8" green="0.1" blue="0.1" opacity="0.3" /> </color> </DropShadow> </effect> </GridPane> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox> </children> </StackPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ToggleButton?> <?import javafx.scene.effect.DropShadow?> <?import javafx.scene.effect.Glow?> <?import javafx.scene.image.Image?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.ColumnConstraints?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.RowConstraints?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.paint.Color?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<StackPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/17" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.example.battleship.controller.GameController"> <children> <ImageView fitHeight="722.0" fitWidth="1281.0" pickOnBounds="true"> <image> <Image url="@images/sea-ships-art-battle-wallpaper-preview.jpg" /> </image> </ImageView> <VBox alignment="TOP_CENTER" prefHeight="720.0" prefWidth="1280.0" spacing="12.0"> <padding> <Insets bottom="15.0" left="25.0" right="25.0" top="15.0" /> </padding> <children> <!-- Top Status Bar --> <HBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="20.0" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.8); -fx-border-color: #334155; -fx-border-radius: 10; -fx-background-radius: 10;"> <padding> <Insets bottom="8.0" left="20.0" right="20.0" top="8.0" /> </padding> <children> <VBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <children> <Label fx:id="lblPlayerName" text="Comandante: Jugador" textFill="#38bdf8"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label fx:id="lblPlayerShipsLeft" text="Flota Aliada: 10/10" textFill="#4ade80"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="13.0" /> </font> </Label> </children> </VBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="10.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label fx:id="lblTurnStatus" alignment="CENTER" style="-fx-background-color: #0284c7; -fx-background-radius: 20;" text=" TURNO DEL JUGADOR" textFill="WHITE"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="6.0" left="25.0" right="25.0" top="6.0" /> </padding> <effect> <Glow level="0.3" /> </effect> </Label> </children> </HBox>
<VBox alignment="CENTER_RIGHT"> <children> <Label text="Oponente: Máquina IA" textFill="#f87171"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="16.0" /> </font> </Label> <Label fx:id="lblEnemyShipsLeft" text="Flota Enemiga: 10/10" textFill="#fca5a5"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="13.0" /> </font> </Label> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Debug feature button (HU-3 for teacher inspection) --> <ToggleButton fx:id="btnToggleEnemyBoard" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleToggleEnemyBoard" style="-fx-background-color: #7c3aed; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-cursor: hand;" text=" Modo Inspección (Profesor)"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="12.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="8.0" left="12.0" right="12.0" top="8.0" /> </padding> </ToggleButton>
<Button fx:id="btnSaveAndExit" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleSaveAndExit" style="-fx-background-color: #dc2626; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-cursor: hand;" text=" Guardar y Salir"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="12.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="8.0" left="12.0" right="12.0" top="8.0" /> </padding> </Button> </children> </HBox>
<!-- Twin Boards Container --> <HBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="35.0" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <!-- Player Board (Posicion) --> <VBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="8.0"> <children> <Label style="-fx-background-color: #1e293b; -fx-border-color: #38bdf8; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-background-radius: 5;" text=" TABLERO DE POSICIÓN (TU FLOTA)" textFill="#38bdf8"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="15.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="4.0" left="12.0" right="12.0" top="4.0" /> </padding> </Label> <GridPane fx:id="gridPlayerBoard" gridLinesVisible="true" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.95); -fx-border-color: #0284c7; -fx-border-width: 2;"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> </columnConstraints> <rowConstraints> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> </rowConstraints> </GridPane> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Enemy Board (Principal) --> <VBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="8.0"> <children> <Label style="-fx-background-color: #1e293b; -fx-border-color: #ef4444; -fx-border-radius: 5; -fx-background-radius: 5;" text="⚔ TABLERO PRINCIPAL (DISPAROS A ENEMIGO)" textFill="#f87171"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="15.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets bottom="4.0" left="12.0" right="12.0" top="4.0" /> </padding> </Label> <GridPane fx:id="gridEnemyBoard" gridLinesVisible="true" style="-fx-background-color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.95); -fx-border-color: #dc2626; -fx-border-width: 2;"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> <ColumnConstraints halignment="CENTER" hgrow="NEVER" prefWidth="38.0" /> </columnConstraints> <rowConstraints> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> <RowConstraints prefHeight="38.0" valignment="CENTER" vgrow="NEVER" /> </rowConstraints> <effect> <DropShadow radius="10.0"> <color> <Color red="0.8" green="0.1" blue="0.1" opacity="0.3" /> </color> </DropShadow> </effect> </GridPane> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox> </children> </StackPane>
